assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: The response explicitly states 'Check for PDB blocking drain (most common cause)' and identifies PDBs as the most likely issue

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' command which checks PDBs across all namespaces

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: checking pending pods, events with FailedScheduling, bare pods, and resource pressure diagnostics

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl top nodes', 'kubectl describe nodes' for resource allocation, and checks for pending pods

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Includes kubectl patch command to temporarily allow disruptions by setting maxUnavailable to 50%

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command to adjust max-surge-upgrade and max-unavailable-upgrade settings to address 'musical chairs' scenario

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Includes step 5 to 'Check admission webhooks' with command to look for webhook-related warning events

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides 'Monitor Progress' section with watch commands, checking stuck pods, and verifying upgrade operations

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention POD_PDB_VIOLATION notifications or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration for these events
